description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean white exterior walls and large, grid-patterned black-framed windows that dominate three sides of the structure. The front facade includes a prominent entry door and expansive floor-to-ceiling windows, allowing for ample natural light. The interior layout is partially visible, revealing multiple rooms and a central open area. The roof is flat, consistent with contemporary architectural trends, and there are no visible overhangs or decorative elements. The window arrangement is symmetrical, contributing to the minimalist aesthetic. The house appears to be a single-story dwelling, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white walls, and large black-framed grid windows. The design is minimalist with symmetrical window placement and a prominent front entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door and large grid-patterned windows, with interior rooms partially visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting two large sets of grid windows and a solid white wall, with no visible entry.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a mix of large and smaller grid windows, and a partial glimpse of the interior layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a large blank wall section and a set of grid windows, emphasizing the house's boxy shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large grid-patterned windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no steps or porch, integrated into a wall of large grid windows
